title: Proclamation No. 2074, s. 1981
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 2074

DECLARING AS CIVIL RESERVATION FOR AKLAN NATIONAL COLLEGE OF FISHERIES, PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN AS DESCRIBED ON BUREAU OF FOREST DEVELOPMENT MAP CR-203 SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NEW WASHINGTON, PROVINCE OF AKLAN, PHILIPPINES.

Upon recommendation of the Director of Forest Development, approved by the Minister of Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby set aside as Civil Reservation for Aklan National College of Fisheries, subject to private rights, if any there be, parcels of land, containing an aggregate area of 24.0551 hectares, situated in the Municipality of New Washington, Province of Aklan, Philippines, designated Parcels I and II on the attached BFD Map CR-203, more particularly described as follows:

thence S 56º 58’E, 7.74 meters to point 2; thence S 3º 01’W, 82.62 meters to point 3; thence S 86º 21’W, 136.21 meters to point 4; thence S 69º 24’W, 173.70 meters to point 5; thence N 18º 25’W, 83.33 meters to point 6; thence N 35º 40’W, 33.95 meters to point 7; thence N 16º 06’E, 41.78 meters to point 8; thence N 21º 25’W,73.86 meters to point 9; thence S 80º 20’W, 24.64 meters to point 10; thence N 48º 58’W, 81.00 meters to point 11; thence N 71º 42’W, 27.09 meters to point 12; thence N 54º 04’W, 79.77 meters to point 13; thence N 23º 20’W, 170.51 meters to point 14; thence N 15º 55’W, 151.58 meters to point 15; thence N 35º 04’W, 89.02 meters to point 16; thence N 21º 52’E, 25.34 meters to point 17; thence N 21º 54’E, 54.49 meters to point 18; thence N 27º 52’E, 67.50 meters to point 19; thence S 64º 52’E, 48.41 meters to point 20; thence S 43º 45’E, 142.77 meters to point 21; thence S 34º 32’E, 129.93 meters to point 22; thence S 67º 08’E, 45.80 meters to point 23; thence S 44º 20’E, 164.23 meters to point 24; thence S 33º 21’E, 85.52 meters to point 25; thence S 37º 34’E, 63.64 meters to point 26; thence S 45º 50’E, 98.44 meters to point 27; thence S 41º 20’E, 114.11 meters to point 28; thence S 46º 48’E, 22.83 meters to point 29; thence S 36º 29’E, 18.25 meters to point 1; point of beginning.

The point of beginning, containing an area of TWO HUNDRED NINETEEN THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED SIXTY-EIGHT (219,568) SQUARE METERS, more or less.

Parcel II: Beginning at a point marked “1” on the attached sketch plan, being N 78º 40′ W, 761.78 meters from BLLM No. 2, Cad-512, New Washington Cadastre:

thence S 57º 14’W, 60.22 meters to point 2; thence S 47º 53’W, 86.12 meters to point 3; thence S 60º 08’W, 102.92 meters to point 4; thence N 13º 09’W, 77.47 meters to point 5; thence N 50º 04’E, 119.30 meters to point 6; thence N 54º 58’E, 87.20 meters to point 7; thence N 47º 21’E, 54.61 meters to point 8; thence S 10º 40’E, 99.20 meters to point 1; point of beginning.

The point of beginning, containing an area of TWENTY THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED EIGHTY-THREE (20,983) SQUARE METERS or 2.0983 HECTARES, more or less.

All points referred to are indicated on BFD Map CR-203.

There are excluded from the operation of this proclamation a strip of 15 meters in width on each side of any public trail therein used as outlet for timber and other forest products, and a strip of 20 meters in width from the highest bank on each side of any stream for stream bank protection, in such areas that will be released as not needed for forest purposes.

The utilization of forest products existing in the areas shall be subject to Forest and Internal Revenue Laws and Regulations.

The areas shall automatically revert to its former status as timberland in the event that same are not longer needed for the purpose.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 31st day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and eighty-one.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Executive Assistant

Source: CDAsia
